title: INVITATION FOR PRE-QUALIFICATION - Lease of Land for Investment
description: The University of Dar es Salaam intends to pre-qualify potential investor and/or firm for Lease of Land for Investment at the University of Dar es Salaam, Mwl. J.K. Nyerere Mlimani Campus. Applications must be submitted through NeST.
eligibility: Open to all applicants as defined in the Regulations. Must register on NeST.
